semantic.role: Unit test suite for the RuleEngine class, verifying rule matching from YAML front-matter files via temporary filesystem setup.
responsibilities: Provide setupRoot helper to scaffold a temporary .spine/rules/ directory with given rule files.
Test that RuleEngine.getRulesForFile returns only rules whose appliesTo glob matches the provided file path.
Clean up temporary directories after each test case to leave no side effects.
outOfScope: Integration with LLM or external services.
Real file system persistence beyond temporary directories.
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (rule test-file-suffix).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Testing RuleEngine's rule matching logic to ensure correctness of the governance rule engine.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactor to remove legacy CLI aliases, rebuild docs, fix schema and tests.
